message:
feat(web): add /swap-meet to sitemap

Adds the Community Prompts Marketplace (Swap Meet) page to the sitemap
with daily change frequency and high priority (0.8).

Also regenerates sitemap.xml with updated timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
